modeling_constraints: Use the public fixed nonideal weights and deterministic voltage-domain reconstruction.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.

properties.observable_contract: All-zero input maps to vlo and all-active input maps to vhi after transition settling.
Inputs b0 through b3 contribute fixed positive weights 1.00, 2.02, 3.96, and 8.08 normalized by their all-active sum.
Each bit is independently interpreted using the public fixed 0.45 V decision threshold.
For every input pattern, the settled output remains within the vlo-to-vhi interval.
Single-bit output increments preserve the stated nonideal weighting rather than ideal powers-of-two weighting.

title: DAC Mismatch Unit Weighting Model
